calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Dismissal - Appeal Abandoned

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Continued To Dec-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-06-2013 Continued To Nov-07-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:20am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk Jean Kong, nothing reported, D525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant counsel, Richard Pratt Esq. appears for Marthe Schreiber, owner, and Rico's Restaurant, Inc.; respondents, Herman and Wayland Woo appear as pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

Respondent's cousel, Mr. Pratt requests 90 days continuance of the case because the respondent, Schreiber is in Hospital due to serious personal injuries. The Court can only continue 30 days per CRC rule 8.811; The respondents, Woo informed the Court that they will be out of town October 3 therefore, Judge Myles continue the matter to November 7, 2013; both parties agreed to the continuance date of November 7th.

9:26am
matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Judgment Entered
